case_title: ESPINOZA, ANGELINA VS CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FCO C/O LOUSE RENNE CIT/ATTOR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ESPINOZA, ANGELINA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FCO C/O LOUSE RENNE CIT/ATTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESPINOZA, ANGELINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FCO C/O LOUSE RENNE CIT/ATTOR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
